name: Basque Tortilla
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-inch skillet, cook bacon over medium heat until crisp. Drain and set aside, reserving 2 tablespoons of drippings.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon and place it aside.
3. In the same skillet, add the reserved drippings. Add peeled, thinly sliced potatoes, onions, parsley, salt, thyme, and pepper.
4. Cover tightly and cook over low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring carefully once or twice.
5. In a small bowl, beat together eggs and milk. Pour this mixture over the potato mixture.
6. Cover and continue cooking over very low heat until the egg is set in the center, about 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Using a wide spatula, loosen the sides and bottom of the skillet. Slide the potatoes onto a serving plate or serve directly from the skillet.
8. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon on top. Serve hot.
